zh.lifeSummary: 當Mahaut de Poissy於大約1189年出生在法國福朗斯 米希時，她的父親Gasce VI de Poissy31歲，母親Constance de Courtenay14歲。她去世於大約1267年7月25日享年79歲，埋葬在法國。

nameMeanings.name: Poissy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from (Le) Boissy, the name of several places in various parts of France, derived from Latin buxus box tree. Compare Boisse and Bushey .

variants.name: Boisse
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Monique, Andre, Emile, Fernand, Laurette, Marcell, Normand.
French: metonymic occupational name for one who measured grain, from Old French boisse ‘measure of grain, sixth of the bushel’ (see Boissel ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mahaut de Poissy was born about 1189, in France Mission, France, her father, Gasce VI de Poissy, was 31 and her mother, Constance de Courtenay, was 14. She died about 25 July 1267, at the age of 79, and was buried in France.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mahaut de Poissy родилась около 1189 г. в местности фрэнс миссион, Франция, её отцу по имени Gasce VI de Poissy было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Constance de Courtenay, 14. Она умерла около 25 июля 1267 г. в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности Франция.
